targetAudience: Users with injury history needing safe, intelligent fitness guidance

keyRequirements.injuryOnboarding: Comprehensive injury history collection with body map
keyRequirements.safetyFirst: Exercise contraindication system prevents harmful recommendations
keyRequirements.painTracking: Daily pain monitoring integrated with workout modifications
keyRequirements.adaptiveCoaching: AI adjusts recommendations based on current condition
keyRequirements.recoverySupport: Specialized coaching for different recovery phases

differentiators: Only AI coach with comprehensive injury integration
Safety-first approach with automatic exercise filtering
Adaptive coaching that evolves with recovery progress

integrationPoints: Enhanced Coach screen with injury context
Extended user profiles with injury history

businessValue: Targets underserved market of users with injury history, differentiates from generic AI coaches, potential healthcare partnerships
